source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task331_') AS OLE_DB_Source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'OLE_DB_Source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task331_') AS OLE_DB_Source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task331_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Data_Flow_Task331_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__source_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__source_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__source_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__source_TableName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__sink_SchemaName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__sink_SchemaName,
(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__sink_TableName' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_View_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331_') AS Server_Relationship_Static_Data_Flow_Task331__sink_TableName;
SELECT ,GETDATE() AS Import_Date,CAST(APP_CIO as VARCHAR) AS {Derived Column 1} FROM dbo.vw_Vuln_Server_OwnerRelationship
